input.label: BIG-IP Hostname:
input.populatingSearch: sourcetype = psm_log http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS | stats count by hostname

input.label: Context Name:
input.populatingSearch: sourcetype = psm_log http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS | stats count by context_name

chart.title: Top Attacking Countries (alarmed)
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" context_name=$context_name$ http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS action="ALERT" `Top_attacking_countries($hostname$)`

chart.title: Top Attacking Countries (blocked)
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" context_name=$context_name$ http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS action="BLOCK" `Top_attacking_countries($hostname$)`

chart.title: Top Attacking IPs (alarmed)
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" context_name=$context_name$ http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS unit_hostname = $hostname$ action="ALERT"| top client_ip limit=20

chart.title: Top Attacking IPs (blocked)
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" context_name=$context_name$ http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS unit_hostname = $hostname$ action="BLOCK"| top client_ip limit=20
